task.name: Stroop Color-Word Task
reference_literature: Stroop, J.R. (1935). Studies of interference in serial verbal reactions. Journal of Experimental Psychology, 18(6), 643-662.
MacLeod, C.M. (1991). Half a century of research on the Stroop effect: An integrative review. Psychological Bulletin, 109(2), 163-203.
Balota, D.A., Yap, M.J., Cortese, M.J., & Watson, J.M. (2008). Beyond mean response latency: Response time distributional analyses of semantic priming. Journal of Memory and Language, 59, 495-523.

detection.selector: (function(){ var el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus'); if(!el) return false; var child = el.firstElementChild; if(!child) return false; return child.style.color === 'red' && child.textContent.trim().toLowerCase() === 'red'; })()

(function(){ var el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus'); if(!el) return false; var child = el.firstElementChild; if(!child) return false; return child.style.color === 'green' && child.textContent.trim().toLowerCase() === 'green'; })()

(function(){ var el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus'); if(!el) return false; var child = el.firstElementChild; if(!child) return false; return child.style.color === 'blue' && child.textContent.trim().toLowerCase() === 'blue'; })()

(function(){ var el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus'); if(!el) return false; var child = el.firstElementChild; if(!child) return false; return child.style.color === 'yellow' && child.textContent.trim().toLowerCase() === 'yellow'; })()

stimuli.description: Non-red word displayed in red color (incongruent, respond to color)

detection.selector: (function(){ var el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus'); if(!el) return false; var child = el.firstElementChild; if(!child) return false; return child.style.color === 'red' && child.textContent.trim().toLowerCase() !== 'red'; })()

stimuli.description: Non-green word displayed in green color (incongruent, respond to color)

detection.selector: (function(){ var el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus'); if(!el) return false; var child = el.firstElementChild; if(!child) return false; return child.style.color === 'green' && child.textContent.trim().toLowerCase() !== 'green'; })()

stimuli.description: Non-blue word displayed in blue color (incongruent, respond to color)

detection.selector: (function(){ var el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus'); if(!el) return false; var child = el.firstElementChild; if(!child) return false; return child.style.color === 'blue' && child.textContent.trim().toLowerCase() !== 'blue'; })()

stimuli.description: Non-yellow word displayed in yellow color (incongruent, respond to color)

detection.selector: (function(){ var el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus'); if(!el) return false; var child = el.firstElementChild; if(!child) return false; return child.style.color === 'yellow' && child.textContent.trim().toLowerCase() !== 'yellow'; })()

task_specific.response_rule: Press the first letter of the font COLOR of the word, ignoring the word meaning
